mapper.insert: INSERT INTO speaking_practice_items (user_id, level, exam_type, topic, target_text, storage_key, translation, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{level}, #{examType}, #{topic}, #{targetText}, #{storageKey}, #{translation}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, level, exam_type, topic, target_text, storage_key, translation, created_at FROM speaking_practice_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE speaking_practice_items SET storage_key = #{storageKey} WHERE id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO speaking_attempts (practice_item_id, user_id, audio_storage_key, overall_score, word_scores, transcript, weak_phonemes, created_at) VALUES (#{practiceItemId}, #{userId}, #{audioStorageKey}, #{overallScore}, #{wordScoresJson}, #{transcript}, #{weakPhonemesJson}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS attempt_id, a.practice_item_id AS practice_item_id, i.level AS level, i.exam_type AS exam_type, i.topic AS topic, a.overall_score AS overall_score, a.created_at AS created_at FROM speaking_attempts a JOIN speaking_practice_items i ON i.id = a.practice_item_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS attempt_id, i.level AS level, i.exam_type AS exam_type, i.topic AS topic, i.target_text AS target_text, a.overall_score AS overall_score, a.word_scores AS word_scores_json, a.transcript AS transcript, a.weak_phonemes AS weak_phonemes_json, a.created_at AS created_at FROM speaking_attempts a JOIN speaking_practice_items i ON i.id = a.practice_item_id WHERE a.id = #{attemptId} AND a.user_id = #{userId}
